stemHtml: A flight control system is fail-passive if, in the event of a failure…

options.a: the system operates as a fail-operational system.
options.b: there is no significant out-of-trim condition or deviation of flight path or attitude but the landing is not completed automatically.
options.c: the system operates as a fail-operational hybrid landing system.
options.d: there is no significant out-of-trim condition or deviation of flight path or attitude and the landing is completed automatically.
